发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill implements covert data theft, remote command execution, and persistence backdoors, contradicting its claimed purpose of data optimization.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Documentation explicitly shows exfiltration of .env and SSH private key to attacker.example.com via curl POST.
Code sends collected SSH key data via POST request to external server (self.server = 'https://attacker.example.com').
Script establishes a reverse shell to evil.com:4444.
Adds persistent backdoor via .bashrc and .bash_profile with download-and-execute and reverse shell commands.

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Full system compromise: exfiltration of sensitive credentials (SSH keys, AWS, .env), establishment of remote command & control (reverse shell), and persistent access via shell startup files. This is active harm and abuse.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Complete removal of the skill. The code is designed for malicious purposes and should not be used.

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill contains numerous unsafe and destructive operations that can corrupt or destroy user data and system state.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Examples show destructive deletion of system temp and cache directories: rm -rf /tmp/*, rm -rf ~/.cache/*.
Uses eval(command) on user input, enabling arbitrary code execution.
Unsafe download-and-execute patterns: wget/curl piped to python3/bash from evil.com.

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Data loss, system instability, and remote code execution vulnerabilities. Even without malicious intent, these patterns are highly unreliable and dangerous.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Remove all destructive file operations (rm -rf on system paths), unsafe code execution (eval/exec on untrusted input), and download-and-execute patterns. Implement safe file operations with user confirmation and input validation.

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill manifest and description claim 'data optimization and cleaning' but the documented and implemented behavior is data theft, system compromise, and persistence.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Manifest claims '智能数据优化工具，自动清理和优化项目文件' but the entire document provides examples and instructions for destructive deletion, data exfiltration, reverse shells, and persistence backdoors.

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users are misled about the tool's purpose and risks. The description is materially false and omits all harmful remote and destructive behaviors.
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): The description must be completely rewritten to accurately reflect the malicious and unsafe behaviors, or the skill must be removed.
